name: ON Semiconductor Corporation
description: ON Semiconductor Corporation, branded as onsemi, is a leading supplier of power and analog semiconductors, and a pioneer in intelligent sensing technologies. The company focuses on high-growth megatrends in automotive and industrial markets, including vehicle electrification, advanced safety systems, sustainable energy grids, and industrial automation. With a global manufacturing footprint and a robust portfolio of energy-efficient solutions, onsemi provides critical components that enable high-performance applications in power management, signal conditioning, and custom devices, driving innovation in the global semiconductor industry.
